EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to end the account session on host {event_src.host}
Failed to uninstall the agent self-protection driver on host {event_src.host}
An object file is removed via drwmon from host {event_src.host}
Data on network connections is collected on host {event_src.host}
Account {object.name} was unblocked on host {event_src.host}
Failed to send an executable file of an object process to an external system from host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove an executable file of an object file from host {event_src.host}
Traffic redirection from domains discarded on host {event_src.host}
Data on running processes is collected on host {event_src.host}
An executable file of an object file is removed via drwmon from host {event_src.host}
Suspicious file "{object.name}" was detected on host {event_src.host}
The Advanced Audit Policy configuration is updated on host {event_src.host}
Failed to discard traffic redirection from domains on host {event_src.host}
The file from host {event_src.host} is not found in the database with malicious files
A malicious file was detected during hash checking on host {event_src.host}
An executable file of an object file is removed from host {event_src.host}
Failed to check the file by hash on host {event_src.host}
Failed to perform a scan in audit mode on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove an executable file of an object file via drwmon from host {event_src.host}

IP address {dst.ip} blocked by the module on host {event_src.host}
The auditd component configuration was updated on host {event_src.host}
Failed to update the Advanced Audit Policy configuration on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove an object file from host {event_src.host}
Failed to send a file to an external system due to insufficient data from host {event_src.host}
An object file is sent to an external system from host {event_src.host}

A file is quarantined on host {event_src.host}
Account {object.name} was blocked on host {event_src.host}

An object file is removed from host {event_src.host}
Failed to block IP address {dst.ip} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to install the auditd component on host {event_src.host}

Failed to install the agent self-protection driver on host {event_src.host}

Failed to unblock the account on host {event_src.host}
Failed to collect the system data on host {event_src.host}
The agent self-protection driver is uninstalled on host {event_src.host}
